contextCapsule.intent: Add a risk x execution-profile model so small strict-risk changes stop paying full ceremony, without weakening the gate set.
approvedScope: Prompt and skill layer for propose/apply/verify
New execution-profile decision in the propose flow
constraints: No runtime code changes in this change
Full gate set is retained for the standard risk level
assumptions: The execution-profile choice is a single-choice decision surfaced at propose time
openRisks: Mode-matrix complexity if defaults are not inferred well
User confusion between risk level and execution profile
confidenceCaps: MEDIUM until the profile decision is answered and the delta specs are reviewed
forbiddenActions: Do not archive the change before verify passes
